title: The Flood Street Count Discrepancy
description: Two triage sheets on the card table, both marked with the Flood Street address in the same block notation, carry different casualty counts: one reads three survivors, one reads two. Neither sheet is annotated with a correction timestamp or a runner's initials. If the wrong number goes to Sergeant Duplessis, the operations post will allocate resources against a figure that does not match the actual population — and the wrong number is not a rounding error, it is a MEDEVAC priority calculation.
